'''odapab''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:father and child|father and child]]".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-p-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:father and child|father and child]]
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dæpibith|dæpibith]] || [[word:dæpibij|dæpibij]] || [[word:dæpibish|dæpibish]] || [[word:dæpibi|dæpibi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dapupubuth|dapupubuth]] || [[word:dapupubuj|dapupubuj]] || [[word:dapupubush|dapupubush]] || [[word:dapupubu|dapupubu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dapubuth|dapubuth]] || [[word:dapubuj|dapubuj]] || [[word:dapubush|dapubush]] || [[word:dapubu|dapubu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dapufbuth|dapufbuth]] || [[word:dapufbuj|dapufbuj]] || [[word:dapufbush|dapufbush]] || [[word:dapufbuf|dapufbuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dæpebeth|dæpebeth]] || [[word:dæpebej|dæpebej]] || [[word:dæpebesh|dæpebesh]] || [[word:dæpebe|dæpebe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dapopoboth|dapopoboth]] || [[word:dapopoboj|dapopoboj]] || [[word:dapopobosh|dapopobosh]] || [[word:dapopobo|dapopobo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dapoboth|dapoboth]] || [[word:dapoboj|dapoboj]] || [[word:dapobosh|dapobosh]] || [[word:dapobo|dapobo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dapofboth|dapofboth]] || [[word:dapofboj|dapofboj]] || [[word:dapofbosh|dapofbosh]] || [[word:dapofbof|dapofbof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[paucal]] || [[word:dapïfbïfth|dapïfbïfth]] || [[word:dapïfbïfj|dapïfbïfj]] || [[word:dapïfbïfsh|dapïfbïfsh]] || [[word:dapïfbïf|dapïfbïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plentiful]] || [[word:dapïfpïfbïfth|dapïfpïfbïfth]] || [[word:dapïfpïfbïfj|dapïfpïfbïfj]] || [[word:dapïfpïfbïfsh|dapïfpïfbïfsh]] || [[word:dapïfpïfbïf|dapïfpïfbïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dæpæbæth|dæpæbæth]] || [[word:dæpæbæj|dæpæbæj]] || [[word:dæpæbæsh|dæpæbæsh]] || [[word:dæpæbæ|dæpæbæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dapapabath|dapapabath]] || [[word:dapapabaj|dapapabaj]] || [[word:dapapabash|dapapabash]] || [[word:dapapaba|dapapaba]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dapabath|dapabath]] || [[word:dapabaj|dapabaj]] || [[word:dapabash|dapabash]] || [[word:dapaba|dapaba]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dapafbath|dapafbath]] || [[word:dapafbaj|dapafbaj]] || [[word:dapafbash|dapafbash]] || [[word:dapafbaf|dapafbaf]]
|}

''56 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dapabatha|dapabatha]] || [[word:dapabaja|dapabaja]] || [[word:dapabasha|dapabasha]] || [[word:dapabaka|dapabaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dapabath|dapabath]] || [[word:dapabaj|dapabaj]] || [[word:dapabash|dapabash]] || [[word:dapaba|dapaba]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dapabathal|dapabathal]] || [[word:dapabajal|dapabajal]] || [[word:dapabashal|dapabashal]] || [[word:dapabakal|dapabakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dapabathatha|dapabathatha]] || [[word:dapabajaja|dapabajaja]] || [[word:dapabashasha|dapabashasha]] || [[word:dapabaka|dapabaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dapabathan|dapabathan]] || [[word:dapabajan|dapabajan]] || [[word:dapabashan|dapabashan]] || [[word:dapabakan|dapabakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dapabathaoro|dapabathaoro]] || [[word:dapabajaoro|dapabajaoro]] || [[word:dapabashaoro|dapabashaoro]] || [[word:dapabakaoro|dapabakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|8d63c8d}}
